name: Senti Biosciences Inc. Common Stock
summary: Senti Biosciences, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing gene circuit technology for cell and gene therapies. Headquartered in South San Francisco, California, the company engineers cells with synthetic biology circuits to improve the efficacy and safety of cell therapies. Senti Bio's platform aims to create smarter and more adaptable cell therapies for a range of diseases.
